title: pilosella × derubella
intro: Pilosella × derubella, also known as False Foxglove, is a hybrid plant that results from the cross between the plants Pilosella officinarum and P. echnatophylla. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pilosella × derubella include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties against certain bacteria and fungi. In herbal preparations, Pilosella × derubella is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to affected areas or taken internally to support overall health and well-being.
